title: mentha aquatica var. crispa
intro: Mentha aquatica var. crispa, also known as curled mint or water mint, is a variety of the water mint plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating digestive issues, headaches, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Mentha aquatica var. crispa include alleviating symptoms of indigestion, nausea, and menstrual cramps, as well as reducing fever and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of curled mint include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing them with a solvent to create a concentrated extract.
